response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in full-stack development with experience in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning with the primary stack. They also have a diverse skill set and experience with various technologies and projects.
strengths: Proficient in TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Diverse experience with multiple programming languages and technologies
concerns: Less direct experience with Nest.js and Vitest
Limited experience with Kotlin/Java for backend services
No direct mention of experience with AI agent development beyond MCP code generators
